narrative:
Geneva Twp township has 6,201 registered voters, with 59.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.4 percentage points.
